sample_analogies: So, what I do like about the CLI, and this is true for most of these AI CLIs, is that they're quite portable.
So I can say something like a simple yes or no.
This gives us insights into our context window usage when we start building things like agents and skills.
So I can run a command like Alice, Grep, cat or any command I'd like to run.
I can even run more complex commands like appget update and I can install tools.
